brain.commentary: Counsellor flags moderate‑high risk due to high‑beta tech (NVDA β 1.88, TSLA β 2.03) and crypto volatility, elevating tail risk. Core equity longs (AAPL, GOOGL, SPY, QQQ, DIA) have modest positive composites and lower volatility, so we keep them but add a small conviction boost. Flat positions in NVDA, TSLA, META, AMZN and all crypto pairs show negative composites, high beta or volatility and are deemed fragile; we trim their conviction. Overall we adopt a risk‑off stance, scaling exposure to 0.78 of target.
